untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires visual identification of 'twin peaks of similar height and width' and 'confirmation line between peaks' — these are geometric/morphological pattern features that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The signal also references a measure rule using 'half the pattern height' which requires explicit peak detection and height calculation not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with basic reversal conditions: entry when price makes higher highs but closes lower (suggesting rejection), and exit on close above the recent high. However, this is a weak approximation of the Adam & Adam Double Top pattern which requires explicit pattern recognition. Author is silent on exact measurement methodology and several key parameters. Recommend implementing custom pattern detection logic outside the backtest engine for proper execution.
